channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Philippine Army Constructs Shelters for Earthquake Victims in Sarangani
item.description: The Philippine Army, in collaboration with local authorities and relief organizations, has been actively constructing temporary shelters for earthquake victims in Sarangani. The efforts aim to provide...

item.title: Supercars Appoints Nick Raman as New Head of Communications
item.description: Supercars has finalized the hiring of Nick Raman, previously BMW Australia's communications manager, to fill the vacant head of communications role. Raman will join the company on August 4, replacing ...

item.title: Australia concerned over China's South Pacific missile tests and regional security implications
item.description: China's recent nuclear-capable missile test in the South Pacific has raised significant concerns among Australian officials, highlighting perceived strategic shifts by Beijing. The launch occurred jus...

item.title: IOC Delays Judgment on Tanzanian Olympic Election Dispute
item.description: The International Olympic Committee (IOC) is holding off on commenting on the controversial Tanzania Olympic Committee (TOC) elections until it receives an independent report from its observer, Donald...

item.title: Martha Karua Calls for Peaceful Saba Saba Protests Amid Government Security Measures
item.description: Kenya's People's Liberation Party (PLP) leader Martha Karua has accused the government of violating constitutional freedoms by deploying heavy security and roadblocks to suppress Saba Saba demonstrati...

item.title: Chief of Staff Threatens Legal Action Against Controversial DG Over Allegations
item.description: Femi Gbajabiamila, President Tinubu's Chief of Staff, has issued a 72-hour ultimatum to Prince Adeniyi Adeyemi, demanding he retract allegations of corruption, abuse of office, fraud, and murder. The ...

item.title: Unifor and Ford in critical negotiations as three-year deal deadline looms
item.description: Union representing Canadian autoworkers, Unifor, is in a critical week of negotiations with Ford Motor Co. as the three-year deal deadline approaches. Talks, which have been ongoing since June 23, are...

item.title: NATO Faces Dual Challenges: Countering Russia's Aggression and Managing Trump's Influence
item.description: The NATO summit in Turkey highlights the alliance's dual challenges of countering Russian aggression in Ukraine and managing U.S. President Donald Trump's unpredictable stance. European leaders are un...

item.title: Assam CM Announces Comprehensive Anti-Drug Measures and Collaborative Efforts
item.description: Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma has assured stringent measures against the drug menace, emphasizing coordinated efforts with neighboring states to curb smuggling. During a state assembly sess...

item.title: Ringo Starr's 24th Birthday Celebrated by The Beatles During a Historic BBC Session
item.description: On July 7, 1964, The Beatles marked Ringo Starr's 24th birthday by recording a special lip-sync performance for the BBC's Top of the Pops television show. The band, at the peak of Beatlemania followin...

item.title: Hontiveros and Pia Cayetano Disagree Over Appropriateness of a Question During Senate Impeachment Trial
item.description: The news reports on a disagreement between Senators Risa Hontiveros and Pia Cayetano during the Senate impeachment trial involving Vice President Sara Duterte. Based on the available information, the ...

item.title: Nigel Farage Faces Resignation Pressure Over Donation Scandals
item.description: Nigel Farage, leader of Reform UK, is set to address speculation about his future in public life following intense scrutiny over controversial donations. The situation arises after reports emerged tha...

item.title: Community heroes behind the World Cup experience
item.description: The article highlights the critical role of local businesses and community workers in enhancing the World Cup experience for millions of South Africans. While global attention focuses on players and m...

item.title: Megyn Kelly criticizes Taylor Swift's large wedding and questions the authenticity of her celebrity relationships
item.description: Megyn Kelly sharply criticized Taylor Swift during an appearance on Piers Morgan Uncensored, using the singer's reported July 3 wedding to Kansas City Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce as the basis for a ...

item.title: Mel C recounts near-expulsion from Spice Girls after clash with Victoria Beckham over hair at 1996 BRITs
item.description: The article explores the contentious relationship between Mel C and Victoria Beckham, focusing on a dramatic incident during the 1996 BRITs where Mel C allegedly told Beckham to 'f**k off' over a disa...

item.title: Ukraine Deploys American Autonomous Vehicles for Combat Support
item.description: Forterra, a US-based company specializing in autonomous vehicles, has deployed over 100 self-driving ATVs in conflict zones of Ukraine for nine months. These Lancer vehicles, based on Polaris ATVs wit...

item.title: ConnexOntario Faces Strain as Gambling Helpline Sees Surge in Calls Amid New Regulations
item.description: ConnexOntario, a non-profit agency managing Ontario's 24-hour gambling helpline, is overwhelmed by a surge in calls linked to the liberalization of online gambling. The organization reported a 68% inc...

item.title: Mombasa Protest Highlights Economic Struggles and Governance Concerns
item.description: Residents in Mombasa held a peaceful 15-minute march protest through the city's Central Business District after agreeing with police on a secure route. The demonstration, organized to address grievanc...

item.title: Leadership Changes at Ram Temple Trust Following Donation Theft Scandal
item.description: The trust managing India's Ram temple, built on the site of the demolished Babri Masjid and consecrated by Prime Minister Narendra Modi in 2024, has undergone leadership changes after allegations of d...

item.title: Trump to Back F-35 Jet Sale to Türkiye Amid Legal Hurdles
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is expected to support the potential sale of F-35 fighter jets to Türkiye during his visit to Ankara, despite unresolved legal and congressional hurdles. The decision comes...
